title: Accommodation Levy Abolition Act 1980
text:
Accommodation Levy Abolition Act 1980
COOK ISLANDS
ACCOMMODATION LEVY ABOLITION ACT
ANALYSIS
Title
1. Short Title and Commencement
2. Repeal
-------------------------------
1980, No. 11
An Act to repeal the Accommodation Levy Act 1978-79
(29 August 1980)
BE IT ENACTED by the Legislative Assembly of the Cook Islands in Session assembled, and by the authority of the same, as follows:
1.
Short Title and commencement
- (1) This Act may be cited as the Accommodation Levy Abolition Act 1980.
(2) This Act shall come into force on the 1st day of September 1980.
2.
Repeal
– The Accommodation Levy Act 1978 hereby repealed.
-----------------------------------
This Act is administered in the Tourist Authority.
